inputs.titre: Philippe Auguste annexe la Normandie à la France, renforçant le pouvoir royal.

reason: The image depicts a scene in a medieval town with half-timbered buildings, cobblestone streets, and people dressed in clothing appropriate for the period. A man is shown signing a document, likely meant to represent the annexation treaty. The architecture and clothing are generally consistent with the 13th century, although some details are somewhat generalized. No obvious anachronisms or elements of fantasy are present. Some of the textures and detail could be enhanced for greater realism, but overall, the image is suitable for depicting the event.
